headline: Veritone Announces Strategic Agreement with Oracle to Accelerate Enterprise AI and AI Data Economy
summary: IRVINE, Calif., March 26, 2026--Veritone, Inc. (NASDAQ: VERI), a leader in building enterprise AI and data solutions, today announced that it has signed a multi-year agreement with Oracle to migrate Veritone AI solutions to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). By adopting OCI as a preferred cloud and infrastructure provider, Veritone will enhance the scalability, security, and performance of its AI offerings, including its aiWARE platform, Veritone Data Refinery (VDR) and Veritone Data Marketplace

headline: Veritone Reports Preliminary, Unaudited Q4 2025 Results and Announces Strategic Deal with Oracle
summary: IRVINE, Calif., March 26, 2026--Veritone, Inc. (NASDAQ: VERI) ("Veritone" or the "Company"), a leader in building enterprise AI and data solutions, today announced preliminary, unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended December 31, 2025*.

headline: Matillion Launches Maia's Migration Agent: Autonomous Migration for Legacy ETL Platforms
summary: Matillion today announced Migration Agent, a new capability within Maia, its flagship AI Data Automation platform, that autonomously converts legacy ETL pipelines into native, warehouse-optimized pipelines on Snowflake, Databricks, and Amazon Redshift.

raw.headline: Matillion Launches Maia's Migration Agent: Autonomous Migration for Legacy ETL Platforms
raw.summary: Matillion today announced Migration Agent, a new capability within Maia, its flagship AI Data Automation platform, that autonomously converts legacy ETL pipelines into native, warehouse-optimized pipelines on Snowflake, Databricks, and Amazon Redshift.

headline: OpenAI Warning Puts Spotlight On Microsoft AI Reliance And Investor Risk
summary: OpenAI has highlighted its heavy reliance on Microsoft as a key business risk as it prepares for a potential IPO. The company is working to diversify its partnerships, including new cloud collaborations with Amazon and Oracle. Reports suggest tension around a reported $50b OpenAI AWS cloud deal, with Microsoft reportedly weighing legal options. Nearly half of Microsoft's commercial AI backlog is tied to OpenAI, putting fresh attention on the durability of this partnership. Microsoft...

headline: Advanced Micro Devices Retreats After a 7% Rally: Can the Linux CIQ Partnership Keep AMD Competitive?
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) stock is trading at around $216 this morning, down approximately 2% as broader market weakness pulls it off Wednesday’s strong close. The retreat follows a 7.26% rally to $220.27 on Wednesday, March 25, a single-day surge that pushed the stock to its highest level in weeks. A 2% pullback after a ... headline: Oracle AI Database Launch Puts Focus On Valuation And Adoption Potential
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) has launched a new Oracle AI Database designed to bring AI models directly into core data and application workflows. The company introduced a no-code Private Agent Factory, allowing enterprises to build custom AI agents with built in security and observability. Updates to Oracle AI Agent Studio and Fusion Agentic Applications focus on workflow orchestration, contextual memory, and outcome driven execution. At a share price of $146.02, Oracle enters this product cycle...

headline: Oracle (ORCL) Price Target Lowered on Revenue Conversion Concerns
summary: Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) ranks among the best rebound stocks to buy right now. headline: The State Of AI Infrastructure: Demand, Costs, And Custom Silicon
summary: Global growth in data center systems investment has accelerated from 5% at an annual rate in the 10 years ended 2022 to 30% in the last 3 years.
